sections_cited: Section 4 of the Land Acquisition Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 1215 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 08.12.2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for the Petitioner Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Manzoor Kanrani, Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki and Naveed Ali, Assistant Commissioner, Ghotki >>>>>>>>>..<<<<<<<< Learned Additional AG files a compliance report on behalf of Respondent No.1 along with certain documents, which are taken on record. A copy thereof has been provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Mr. Manzoor Kanrani, Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki, is present and submits that the correct B-Form has now been received, and that the Notification under Section 4 of the Land Acquisition Act, 1894 is under process. He further submits that thereafter the Notification under Section 6 of the said Act will be issued and the Award shall be passed. He requests a period of three months to fulfill the entire requirement. In view of the above, this petition is disposed of with directions to the Deputy Commissioner, Ghotki, to comply with his undertaking within a period of four months. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
